title: Suleiman the Magnificent becomes sultan of the Ottoman Empire
fact: Suleiman I, commonly known as Suleiman the Magnificent, was the Ottoman sultan from 1520 to 1566.

title: Mehmed II becomes sultan of the Ottoman Empire
fact: Mehmed II, commonly known as Mehmed the Conqueror, was the sultan of the Ottoman Empire twice, from August 1444 to September 1446 and then later from February 1451 to May 1481.

title: Osman I becomes sultan of the Ottoman Empire
fact: Osman I or Osman Ghazi was the eponymous founder of the Ottoman Empire.

title: Abdul Hamid II becomes sultan of the Ottoman Empire
fact: Abdülhamid II or Abdul Hamid II was the 34th sultan of the Ottoman Empire, from 1876 to 1909, and the last sultan to exert effective control over the fracturing state.

title: Mehmed VI becomes sultan of the Ottoman Empire
fact: Mehmed VI Vahideddin, also known as Şahbaba among the Osmanoğlu family, was the last sultan of the Ottoman Empire and the penultimate Ottoman caliph, reigning from 4 July 1918 until 1 November 1922, when the Ottoman Sultanate was abolished and replaced by the Republic of Turkey on 29 October 1923.

title: Orhan becomes sultan of the Ottoman Empire
fact: Orhan Ghazi was the second sultan of the Ottoman Empire from 1323/4 to 1362.

title: Selim I becomes sultan of the Ottoman Empire
fact: Selim I, also known as Selim the Grim or Selim the Resolute, was the sultan of the Ottoman Empire from 1512 to 1520.

title: Selim II becomes sultan of the Ottoman Empire
fact: Selim II, also known as Selim the Blond or Selim the Drunkard, was the sultan of the Ottoman Empire from 1566 until his death in 1574.

title: Bayezid II becomes sultan of the Ottoman Empire
fact: Bayezid II was the sultan of the Ottoman Empire from 1481 to 1512.

title: Bayezid I becomes sultan of the Ottoman Empire
fact: Bayezid I, also known as Bayezid the Thunderbolt, was the sultan of the Ottoman Empire from 1389 to 1402.

title: Ahmed I becomes sultan of the Ottoman Empire
fact: Ahmed I was the sultan of the Ottoman Empire from 1603 to 1617.

title: Murad IV becomes sultan of the Ottoman Empire
fact: Murad IV was the sultan of the Ottoman Empire from 1623 to 1640, known both for restoring the authority of the state and for the brutality of his methods.

title: Murad II becomes sultan of the Ottoman Empire
fact: Murad II was twice the sultan of the Ottoman Empire, from 1421 to 1444 and from 1446 to 1451.

title: Murad I becomes sultan of the Ottoman Empire
fact: Murad I, nicknamed Hüdavendigâr, was the sultan of the Ottoman Empire from 1362 to 1389.

title: Mahmud II becomes sultan of the Ottoman Empire
fact: Mahmud II was the sultan of the Ottoman Empire from 1808 until his death in 1839.

title: Murad III becomes sultan of the Ottoman Empire
fact: Murad III was the sultan of the Ottoman Empire from 1574 until his death in 1595.

title: Mehmed V becomes sultan of the Ottoman Empire
fact: Mehmed V Reşâd was the penultimate sultan of the Ottoman Empire from 1909 to 1918.

title: Mehmed III becomes sultan of the Ottoman Empire
fact: Mehmed III was the sultan of the Ottoman Empire from 1595 until his death in 1603.

title: Mehmed IV becomes sultan of the Ottoman Empire
fact: Mehmed IV, nicknamed as Mehmed the Hunter, was the sultan of the Ottoman Empire from 1648 to 1687.

title: Mehmed I becomes sultan of the Ottoman Empire
fact: Mehmed I, also known as Mehmed Çelebi or Kirişçi, was the sultan of the Ottoman Empire from 1413 to 1421.

title: Abdülaziz becomes sultan of the Ottoman Empire
fact: Abdulaziz was the sultan of the Ottoman Empire from 25 June 1861 to 30 May 1876, when he was overthrown in a government coup.

title: Mustafa I becomes sultan of the Ottoman Empire
fact: Mustafa I was twice the sultan of the Ottoman Empire from 22 November 1617 to 26 February 1618, and from 20 May 1622 to 10 September 1623.

title: Murad V becomes sultan of the Ottoman Empire
fact: Murad V was the sultan of the Ottoman Empire from 30 May to 31 August 1876.

title: Abdülmecid I becomes sultan of the Ottoman Empire
fact: Abdul Mejid I was the 31st sultan of the Ottoman Empire.

title: Selim III becomes sultan of the Ottoman Empire
fact: Selim III was the sultan of the Ottoman Empire from 1789 to 1807.

title: Osman II becomes sultan of the Ottoman Empire
fact: Osman II, also known as Osman the Young, was the sultan of the Ottoman Empire from 26 February 1618 until his regicide on 20 May 1622.

title: Ahmed III becomes sultan of the Ottoman Empire
fact: Ahmed III was sultan of the Ottoman Empire and a son of sultan Mehmed IV.

title: Abdul Hamid I becomes sultan of the Ottoman Empire
fact: Abdülhamid I or Abdul Hamid I was the sultan of the Ottoman Empire from 1774 to 1789.

title: Ibrahim I becomes sultan of the Ottoman Empire
fact: Ibrahim was the sultan of the Ottoman Empire from 1640 until 1648.

title: Osman III becomes sultan of the Ottoman Empire
fact: Osman III was the sultan of the Ottoman Empire from 1754 to 1757.

title: Mustafa II becomes sultan of the Ottoman Empire
fact: Mustafa II was the sultan of the Ottoman Empire from 1695 to 1703.

title: Suleiman II becomes sultan of the Ottoman Empire
fact: Suleiman II was the sultan of the Ottoman Empire from 1687 to 1691.

title: Mustafa IV becomes sultan of the Ottoman Empire
fact: Mustafa IV was the sultan of the Ottoman Empire from 1807 to 1808.

title: Mahmud I becomes sultan of the Ottoman Empire
fact: Mahmud I, known as Mahmud the Hunchback, was the sultan of the Ottoman Empire from 1730 to 1754.

title: Mustafa III becomes sultan of the Ottoman Empire
fact: Mustafa III was the sultan of the Ottoman Empire from 1757 to 1774.

title: Ahmed II becomes sultan of the Ottoman Empire
fact: Ahmed II was the sultan of the Ottoman Empire from 1691 to 1695.

title: Şehzade Ali Vâsib becomes sultan of the Ottoman Empire
fact: Şehzade Ali Vâsib Efendi was an Ottoman prince.
